case_title: TOMAS PENA VS. BRIAN ALEXANDER MALTEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-06-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-06-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL.
